ab: Toli, mngi cu maray enpit la, ksyuxi cu cikay ki?
ch: W:Toli，我忘了帶筆，你可以借我嗎?
en: Toli, I forgot to bring my pen. Can you lend me one?

ab: uka kingan uyi, arwa ni Kumu qani.
en: I don’t have one either. This is Kumu’s.

ab: ana ga ksyuxay ta cikay ki? masoq lga bqanun misu la.
ch: W:那可以借我一下子嗎?我很快就還你。
en: Can you lend me the pen for a second? I will return to you immediately.

ab: uya, agan ga.
en: Sure, take it.

ab: mhuway su, mhuway su kusa Kumu uyi ki.
en: Thank you and thank Kumu for me.

ab: nanu siyon su cukaw?
en: May I help you?

ab: mwah cu matu kinsyuxan mu saying bbiru.
en: I want to return these two books.

ab: uya, maki na siyon su cukaw na?
en: No problem and what else do you need?

ab: ksiyux cu tyugan bbiru loyi.
en: I would like to borrow these three books.

ab: uya ga. tyugan nabi lga kngyay su mwah matu.
ch: A:好了。記得三天後要拿來還。
en: Sure and remember to return them after three days.

ab: ini su sali matu na ccom mu.
en: You haven’t returned me the eraser.

ab: wan mu biqan chesa la.
en: I returned it yesterday.

ab: cyu wayan uka ccom mu la.
ch: M:那我的橡皮擦怎麼不見了。
en: Then, why is my eraser missing?

ab: una su wayan ksyuxan Pasang la.
en: Did you lend it to Pasang?

ab: ini mu baqi. Salay mu kmayan hiya.
en: I don’t know. I will go and ask her.

ab: pksyuxay misu ccom mu ha.
en: I will lend you my eraser first.

ab: Kumu, lukus khmay qani ga kinsyuxan su ni Pihu ga?
en: Kumu, did Pihu lend you this coat?

ab: iyat ,bnesan cu ni yaya mu.
ch: W:不是，這是我媽媽買給我的
en: No, my mom bought it for me.

ab: zyanba ni Pihu ga mtnaq cimu.
en: Pihu’s coat is the same as yours.

ab: mqatung qa zyanba nya, ini ptnaq patas myan.
ch: W:他的外套是黑色的，我們的顏色不一樣。
en: His coat is black, so our colors are different.

ab: Yaway, wan su ksiyux pila ni Pasang?
en: Yaway, did you borrow money from Pasang?

ab: uya, calay ga akay mu biqan coni hiya, mingi cu maray pila la.
ch: W:有，我本來今天要還他，我忘記帶錢了。
en: Yes, I was supposed to return to him today, but I forgot to bring the money.

ab: knwan qa biqun su?
en: Then, when will you return the money?

ab: cugan qa biqun mu hiya.
en: I will return to him tomorrow.

ab: uya, kyalaw mu Pasang ga.
en: Okay, I will tell Pasang for you.
